mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsSlctnDao.selectList */ select bsns_slctn_id , last_slctn_trget_id , coalesce(total_wct,0) as total_wct /*총사업비*/ , coalesce(sport_budget,0) as sport_budget /*지원예산*/ , coalesce(alotm_cash,0) as alotm_cash /*부담금현금*/ , coalesce(alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_acthng /*부담금현물*/ , coalesce(alotm_cash + alotm_acthng,0) as alotm_sum /*소계*/ , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_bsns_slctn /*사업선정대상*/ where bsns_slctn_id = #{bsnsSlctnId}
